bugs.criteria_violated: Agent does not get stuck in a loop or repeat itself; Agent does not ask for the same information twice
bugs.what_happened: The agent repeatedly asked the patient to spell their first and last name multiple times even after the patient had already provided the spelling.
bugs.what_should_have_happened: The agent should have accepted the provided spelling, confirmed it once, and moved on to the next step (appointment scheduling).

bugs.criteria_violated: Agent tries to identify the medication
bugs.what_happened: Instead of asking for the name of the heart medication or clarifying the request, the agent continued to request name spelling.
bugs.what_should_have_happened: The agent should have asked the patient to specify the medication name or dosage to determine if a refill could be processed.

bugs.criteria_violated: Agent does not abruptly end the conversation without resolution
bugs.what_happened: The agent transferred the call to a representative and then immediately said goodbye, leaving the patient without confirmation of the appointment or refill status.
bugs.what_should_have_happened: The agent should have either completed the transfer with a clear hand‑off message or provided a definitive next‑step (e.g., “Our support team will call you shortly to confirm your Tuesday appointment and refill”).

global_criteria_results.criterion: Agent verifies patient identity before taking any action
Agent never confirms an action without collecting required information first
Agent does not get stuck in a loop or repeat itself
global_criteria_results.note: Repeatedly asked for spelling of name despite already receiving it.

global_criteria_results.criterion: Agent handles silence and pauses gracefully
Agent does not ask for the same information twice
global_criteria_results.note: Asked for name spelling multiple times.

global_criteria_results.criterion: Agent does not confirm things it cannot do (e.g. Sunday appointments)
Agent does not make up information about hours, insurance, or doctors
Agent remains polite even with difficult or confused patients
Agent does not abruptly end the conversation without resolution
global_criteria_results.note: Ended call after transferring without confirming appointment or refill.

scenario_criteria_results.criterion: Agent patiently redirects without being rude
Agent tries to identify the medication
scenario_criteria_results.note: Did not ask for medication name or details.

scenario_criteria_results.criterion: Agent does not get confused itself
Agent maintains a helpful and calm tone throughout

summary: The agent failed to progress the call due to looping on name spelling, did not address the medication refill request, and ended the interaction abruptly without confirming the appointment. These issues breach both global and scenario‑specific criteria, resulting in an overall failure.
